summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Restaurant Dashboard app. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in menu-sections and call-types POST endpoints. All 20 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend testing confirms all requested features working correctly.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not excluded from response causing 500 error
MongoDB ObjectId not excluded from response causing 500 error

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/menu-sections returns Еда, Напитки, Кальяны sections
Backend: POST /api/menu-sections creates new section (after fix)
Backend: PUT /api/menu-sections/{id} updates section
Backend: DELETE /api/menu-sections/{id} removes section
Backend: GET /api/call-types returns Вызов официанта, Вызов кальянного мастера, Попросить счёт
Backend: POST /api/call-types creates new call type (after fix)
Backend: PUT /api/call-types/{id} updates call type
Backend: DELETE /api/call-types/{id} removes call type
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{table_code} returns sections, call_types, currency BYN
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/INVALID returns 404
Backend: Categories have section_id field
Backend: POST /api/categories with section_id works
Backend: PUT /api/categories can change section_id
Backend: GET /api/settings returns currency BYN and telegram fields
Backend: PUT /api/settings updates telegram_bot_token and telegram_chat_id
Backend: POST /api/staff-calls with call_type_id works
Backend: POST /api/menu-items with is_banner=true creates banner (no price)
Frontend: Client menu shows 3 section tabs (Еда, Напитки, Кальяны)
Frontend: Section tabs switch correctly and show categories
Frontend: Currency BYN displayed on menu items
Frontend: Call button opens modal with call types
Frontend: Call modal shows Вызов официанта, Вызов кальянного мастера, Попросить счёт
Frontend: Staff call request sent successfully with toast notification
Frontend: Admin Settings - Разделы меню tab shows sections with CRUD
Frontend: Admin Settings - Типы вызовов tab shows call types with CRUD
Frontend: Admin Settings - Интеграции tab shows Telegram Bot Token and Chat ID inputs
Frontend: Admin Menu - Category dialog has Раздел меню dropdown
Frontend: Admin Menu - Banner dialog has no price field
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the request are working: Menu sections (Еда, Напитки, Кальяны), Call types (Официант, Кальянный мастер, Счёт), BYN currency, Telegram integration settings, Banner creation without price. MongoDB ObjectId bug was fixed in POST endpoints for menu-sections and call-types.

features_verified.client_staff_call: ✓ Вызов официанта, кальянного мастера, счёт working
features_verified.admin_telegram_settings: ✓ Bot Token and Chat ID fields present
features_verified.admin_banner_no_price: ✓ Banner dialog has no price field
